revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a game-development pixel-art animated sprite sheet.

Canvas and layout requirements:
- Exact image size: 1024x512 px.
- 2 rows x 4 columns, 8 frames total, each frame 256x256 px.
- TOP row = frames 1-4 left to right; BOTTOM row = frames 5-8 left to right.
- Do not draw visible grid lines, borders, cell separators, frame numbers, labels, text, UI, logos, signatures, or watermarks.
- Background must be a perfectly solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta filling all empty space, with no gradients, shadows, texture, or noise.
- Every frame must stay fully inside its own 256x256 cell with clear solid magenta margin between the figure/sword and every cell edge.
- No detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no dust specks, no seam slivers, no leftover effect residue.

Style requirements:
- Crisp high-resolution 16-bit-plus SNES-style pixel art, sharp low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur.
- Dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source, bright cheerful mythical-Japan RPG palette.
- Consistent palette, pixel density, outline style, and scale across all frames.

Reference matching:
- Use the attached approved walking-sheet character as the exact identity and proportion reference.
- Re-pose the referenced character only; do not redesign, restyle, or resize him.
- Match the same head-to-body ratio, total standing height, body width, limb thickness, clothing palette, outline style, and pixel density from the reference.
- Character height should be about 70% of each 256px cell height, large but with safe margins.
- Same character identity and same scale in every frame; feet on the same ground line in every cell.

Character:
- Mito, an androgynous 15-year-old wanderer in a bright fantasy-Japanese traveler outfit, not samurai, not ninja.
- Ink-black short hair tied into a tiny low ponytail at the nape, vermilion braided-cord hair ornament.
- Outfit from the reference: white tube-sleeved top, short indigo-blue haori jacket with small vermilion braided-cord knots on sleeves and hem, loose young-leaf-green hakama trousers tucked into dark leggings with red cord ties, light travel sandals, vermilion braided belt-sash with small tassel, necklace with three pale-green magatama beads.
- Short ritual sword with a white scabbard at left hip wrapped with thin sacred rope and tiny white paper streamers; it should read as a festival ritual implement, not a samurai katana.

Camera and facing:
- Top-down 3/4 game sprite view, facing UP.
- PURE BACK VIEW in every frame: we see only the back of his head with the tiny low ponytail, back of the indigo haori, both shoulders, back of arms, back of hakama, legs, and sandals.
- Absolutely no face, no eyes, no chest, no front torso, no side-twist torso.
- Torso never twists into front or side view.

Action:
- An 8-frame simple two-handed forward chop, facing up, back always to viewer.
- He holds the short ritual sword with BOTH HANDS together on the hilt in EVERY frame.
- Both arms move together symmetrically and stay close to the body; never one hand, never an idle hand hanging at the side, never arms pointing in opposite directions.
- Blade points straight away from the viewer into the screen / toward the top of each cell. Keep the blade small, clean, solid, and understated; do not show a large prominent edge.
- No motion trail, no swoosh, no afterimage, no energy effect, no glow. Draw only the solid body and the solid sword in every frame.
- Do not raise the blade high overhead. Do not draw an elaborate wind-up.

Frame poses:
1. Both hands hold the hilt centered in front of him; blade points away toward the top of the cell.
2. Small windup; both arms draw back slightly together while blade still points away.
3. Both arms push the sword forward away from the viewer.
4. Key pose: both arms extended forward, blade pointing away along the ground ahead; simple natural two-handed forward strike.
5. Begin settling from the extended strike.
6. Settle further; arms retract slightly together.
7. Return toward centered two-hand hold.
8. Centered two-hand hold, matching frame 1 for a seamless loop.

Strict avoid list:
- No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, Sakuna characters, logos, or likeness.
- No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects.
- No horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird, no companion creature, no letter emblems, no modern text/watermark/UI.
